_meta.note: Batch 1: 20 mountains. Specs distilled from Pinoy Mountaineer guide pages (difficulty x/9, trail class, days/hours, jump-off, LLA coordinates) with status checks from news/PHIVOLCS. Descriptions are original bilingual text. Fields we could not source are null (shown as TBC).

summary.en: Luzon's highest peak and the Philippines' most famous 'sea of clouds' mountain. The Ambangeg trail winds gently through pine forest, mossy forest and vast dwarf-bamboo grasslands to a summit sunrise that regularly floats above an ocean of clouds. Part of the Grand Cordillera Trail.
summary.zh: 吕宋岛最高峰，菲律宾最负盛名的『云海圣山』。Ambangeg 路线平缓，穿过松林、苔藓林和辽阔的矮竹草坡，山顶日出常年悬于云海之上，是菲律宾徒步的标志性画面。

tips.en: Book with the DENR station in advance — daily visitor caps apply. Night temperatures can approach 0°C; bring a warm layer. Arrange a jeepney from Baguio direct to the ranger station to make a 2-day itinerary comfortable.
tips.zh: 需提前向 DENR 登记（有每日人数限制）。夜间气温可接近 0°C，务必带保暖层。建议从碧瑶包吉普尼直达护林站，两天行程更从容。

duration.zh: 一日往返（全程纵走 4–6 小时）

jumpoff.en: Brgy. Ampucao, Itogon (40 min from Baguio)
jumpoff.zh: Ampucao 村（距碧瑶约 40 分钟车程）

summary.en: The Mt. Ulap Eco-Trail is the classic ridge walk near Baguio: grassland and pine ridges with sweeping Cordillera views, the famous Gungal Rock photo spot, and the Pong-ol burial caves on the descent to Sta. Fe.
summary.zh: 碧瑶近郊最经典的山脊线路。Eco-Trail 沿草坡与松林山脊而行，科迪勒拉群山一路铺展，途经著名的 Gungal 悬岩拍照点，下山经 Pong-ol 悬棺洞穴至 Sta. Fe。

tips.en: Register at the Ampucao barangay hall (guides required). Go on a weekday if you can — weekends get crowded. Start early for the best light on the ridges.
tips.zh: 在 Ampucao 村委会登记并请向导。尽量选工作日，周末人多。清晨出发山脊光线最佳。

province.zh: 新比斯开省 / 本格特省

jumpoff.en: Kayapa, Nueva Vizcaya (exit Brgy. Tinongdan, Itogon)
jumpoff.zh: Kayapa（新比斯开省），出口 Tinongdan 村（伊托贡）

summary.en: A long, rewarding traverse through pine forests and Cordillera highland villages, with near-constant views of the region's great peaks. A favourite 'first major climb' for hikers stepping up from dayhikes.
summary.zh: 一条漫长而回报丰厚的纵走线：松林、高山村落、以及几乎全程相伴的科迪勒拉群峰视野。常被视为从一日徒步进阶到多日纵走的首选。

tips.en: The traverse is reversible (Kayapa ⇄ Itogon). Water sources exist in villages along the way; plan camps around them. Trail runs long — pace yourself on day one.
tips.zh: 纵走方向可逆（Kayapa ⇄ Itogon）。沿途村落有水源，扎营点围绕水源规划。路程很长，第一天注意控制节奏。

time_to_summit.zh: 徒步约 2 小时（另乘 4×4 约 45 分钟）

jumpoff.zh: Sta. Juliana 村（打拉省卡帕斯）

summary.en: The 1991 eruption was the century's second largest — today a 4×4 ride across lahar plains and an easy 2-hour walk lead to a crater lake whose colour shifts from cyan to jade through the year. Central Luzon's most spectacular easy trek.
summary.zh: 1991 年那场 20 世纪第二大的火山喷发，如今化作中吕宋最壮观的轻徒步：4×4 越野车穿越火山灰平原，再步行约 2 小时即抵火口湖——湖水随季节在青蓝与碧绿之间变换。

tips.en: Tour packages (vehicle, guide, permits) run ~P1,600–2,000. Swimming in the lake is possible but stay near shore — currents are dangerous mid-lake. Avoid the wet season (May–Sep): heavy rain can trigger lahar floods.
tips.zh: 打包行程（车辆+向导+许可）约 1,600–2,000 比索。火口湖可下水但只限岸边，湖心水流危险。避开雨季（5–9月），暴雨可能引发火山泥流。

jumpoff.en: Arayat National Park, Brgy. Bano, Arayat
jumpoff.zh: 阿拉亚特国家公园（Bano 村）

summary.en: A lone volcanic massif rising straight out of the Pampanga rice plains, wrapped in legend as the home of the deity Sinukuan. Two peaks (North 1030 m, South 1008 m) and a classic traverse between Magalang and Arayat town.
summary.zh: 从邦板牙稻田平原拔地而起的孤立火山，传说中山神 Sinukuan 的居所。南北双峰（1030 m / 1008 m），Magalang 与 Arayat 镇之间的双峰纵走是经典走法。

tips.en: About half the trail is exposed — start early and bring sun protection plus insect repellent. Clarify entrance/guide fees at the park beforehand (overcharging has been reported).
tips.zh: 约一半路段无树荫，务必早出发、做好防晒并带驱虫剂。公园门票和向导费请提前问清（曾有乱收费的情况）。

name.zh: 塔拉克山脊（马里韦莱斯山）

summary.en: The craggy west-face ridge of Mt. Mariveles, with a windswept campsite and a 270° sweep over Manila Bay, Corregidor and the South China Sea. Its name blends 'tabak' (blade) and 'tarik' (steep) — apt for its sharp rocky profile.
summary.zh: 马里韦莱斯山西侧的嶙峋山脊。营地迎风而立，270° 视野横扫马尼拉湾、科雷希多岛与南海。其名由『tabak』（刀）与『tarik』（陡）合成，正如其锋利的岩脊轮廓。

tips.en: One of the few destinations where guides are optional — good for practising navigation. The lower trail is exposed and hot; brushfires occur in Mar–Apr. Bring solid tent pegs: ridge nights are very windy.
tips.zh: 少数不强制请向导的路线之一，适合练习自主导航。下段暴晒，3–4 月偶有山火。山脊夜风极大，帐篷地钉要带足。

jumpoff.zh: Evercrest 高尔夫球场（纳苏格布）

summary.en: The beginner's classic near Tagaytay: rolling open ridges, a loop of 'old' and 'new' trails, and a short steep assault to a rocky summit overlooking Taal Lake, Balayan Bay and the Cavite plains.
summary.zh: 大雅台附近的新手经典：连绵起伏的开阔山脊，新旧两条路线可环线连走，登顶前一段陡坡，山顶岩石平台俯瞰塔尔湖、巴拉扬湾与甲米地平原。

tips.en: Fully exposed — very hot on clear days and muddy in the wet season (Jun–Oct). Take the old trail up (partial shade) and the new trail down. Jan–Feb offers the coolest, driest weather.
tips.zh: 全程几乎无遮蔽，晴天酷热、雨季（6–10月）泥泞。建议旧线上（部分树荫）、新线下。1–2 月天气最干爽凉快。

province.zh: 甲米地省特尔纳特 / 八打雁省

jumpoff.en: DENR Station, Magnetic Hill, Ternate, Cavite

summary.en: 'Parrot's Beak' — the monolith spire Spanish sailors used as a landmark. Forested trails lead to a grassy summit facing the famous rock tower, with Corregidor and the South China Sea beyond. Reopened after a six-year rehabilitation.
summary.zh: 『鹦鹉之喙』——西班牙水手当年的航海地标。林间步道通往草坡山顶，正对标志性的独石岩塔，远眺科雷希多岛与南海。历经六年生态修复后已重新开放。

tips.en: Online booking is mandatory (mppmngnp.com) — 90 hikers/day, Wed–Sat only; book 2–3 weeks ahead. Walk-ins are refused. Climbing the monolith itself is strictly prohibited. Water can be scarce in the dry season.
tips.zh: 必须在官网（mppmngnp.com）提前预约——每日限 90 人、仅周三至周六开放，建议提前 2–3 周抢名额，现场不接受未预约者。独石岩塔本体禁止攀爬。旱季沿途水源紧缺。

status.en: Open with strict online booking (90/day, Wed–Sat). Monolith climbing banned.
status.zh: 已重新开放，但须官网预约（每日 90 人，周三至周六）；独石禁止攀爬。

time_to_summit.zh: Rockies 1–2 小时 · 主峰 2–4 小时

summary.en: Home of the 'Rockies' — a cliff-edge viewpoint hanging directly above Taal Lake. Most hikers do the short Rockies out-and-back (3/9); the full Rockies–Summit–Grotto traverse (4/9, 930 m) adds forest and a pilgrimage descent.
summary.zh: 以『Rockies』悬崖观景点闻名——崖壁正下方就是塔尔湖。多数人走 Rockies 短线往返（难度 3/9）；Rockies–主峰–Grotto 全纵走（4/9，930 m）则加上森林段与朝圣步道下山。

tips.en: Guides are required (from ~P400 for the Rockies). Watch your footing on the boulders at the Rockies — exposure is real. Weekends are extremely busy; go early.
tips.zh: 强制请向导（Rockies 段约 400 比索起）。Rockies 巨石区注意脚下，临空感很强。周末人流爆满，尽量赶早。

summary.en: A Sierra Madre gem close enough to Manila for a dayhike: limestone summit ledges over a sea of green, then a descent to the Tinipak River with its sculpted white boulders, springs, pools and caves.
summary.zh: 西马德雷山脉中离马尼拉最近的宝藏路线：石灰岩山顶平台俯瞰绿海，下山接 Tinipak 河——雪白的水蚀巨石、清泉、天然泳池与洞穴一气呵成。

tips.en: Register at the barangay hall; the village runs an organised guide system. Combine summit + Tinipak River in one loop — the river is the highlight, don't skip it. Expect a raft crossing on the access road.
tips.zh: 在村委会登记，村里有成熟的向导体系。强烈建议山顶 + Tinipak 河环线连走——河谷才是精华。进村公路需乘竹筏过河一次。

jumpoff.en: Sitio Jordan, Sto. Tomas, Batangas → UPLB, Los Baños
jumpoff.zh: Sitio Jordan（Sto. Tomas）→ 洛斯巴尼奥斯 UPLB

summary.en: The legendary mountain of Maria Makiling, wearing some of the best-preserved rainforest near Manila. The 'MakTrav' traverse crosses the roped Melkas Ridge and the Wild Boar Trail to Peak 2, descending the gentle UPLB trail.
summary.zh: 山灵玛丽亚·马基灵的传说之山，保有马尼拉周边最完好的雨林。经典『MakTrav』纵走翻越需拉绳的 Melkas 岩脊与野猪径直上主峰 Peak 2，再沿平缓的 UPLB 线下山。

tips.en: Limatik (leeches) are abundant in the wet season — wear high socks and bring salt/alcohol. The Melkas Ridge segment is exposed; use the fixed ropes. Register on both the Sto. Tomas and UPLB sides.
tips.zh: 雨季旱蚂蟥极多——高筒袜+盐/酒精必备。Melkas 岩脊段暴露感强，务必使用固定绳。Sto. Tomas 与 UPLB 两侧都需登记。

jumpoff.zh: Kinabuhayan 村（奎松省多洛雷斯）

summary.en: The sacred volcano of Southern Tagalog — a pilgrimage mountain of springs, caves and shrines ('puestos'), crowned by the Durungawan crater rim viewpoints. Its cultural weight is as great as its physical presence.
summary.zh: 南他加禄的圣山——泉水、洞穴与朝圣点（puestos）遍布，山顶 Durungawan 崖口俯瞰巨大火山口。它的文化分量与山体本身同样厚重，每年圣周都有大批朝圣者上山。

tips.en: Summit access has been restricted since 2004 for ecological recovery — climbing requires a permit from the Mts. Banahaw–San Cristobal Protected Landscape office, and only limited areas may open. Verify current rules before planning; do not climb closed sections.
tips.zh: 为生态恢复，2004 年起长期限制登顶——需向 Banahaw–San Cristobal 保护区办公室申请许可，且通常仅部分区域开放。出行前务必确认最新政策，切勿进入封闭区域。

status.en: Restricted (protected area) — permit required; summit access limited. Verify before going.
status.zh: 保护区限制进入——需许可证，登顶区域受限，出行前务必核实。

jumpoff.zh: PHIVOLCS 观测站（阿尔拜省塔巴科）

summary.en: The world's most perfect volcanic cone and the Philippines' most active volcano (46+ eruptions since 1814). Climbs ascend old lava gullies to Camp 2 and the 'Knife Edge' at ~2,200 m; the loose summit cone is rarely permitted.
summary.zh: 世界上最完美的火山锥，也是菲律宾最活跃的火山（1814 年以来喷发 46+ 次）。路线沿古熔岩沟上到 Camp 2 与约 2,200 m 的『刀锋』段；顶部碎石锥通常不被允许攀登。

tips.en: Climbing is frequently suspended by PHIVOLCS alerts — always check the current alert level; when open, go with accredited local guides only. Barren upper slopes: carry 4–5 L of water and full sun protection. Crater fumes are toxic.
tips.zh: 攀登常因 PHIVOLCS 警戒而暂停——出发前必查警戒级别，开放时也只能跟持证向导。上段寸草不生：带足 4–5 升水并全套防晒。火山口气体有毒，切勿靠近。

status.en: Summit climbing suspended due to volcanic activity — check PHIVOLCS alerts.
status.zh: 因火山活动暂停登顶——请查询 PHIVOLCS 最新警戒。

jumpoff.zh: Mambucal 村（西内格罗斯省穆尔西亚）

summary.en: The Visayas' highest mountain and the country's largest active volcano: dipterocarp and montane forest, crater lagoons, the Margaha Valley, and a vast bare summit crater. The Wasay–Guintubdan traverse is the classic route.
summary.zh: 米沙鄢最高峰、菲律宾最大的活火山：龙脑香林与山地森林、火口湖、Margaha 谷，以及寸草不生的巨大山顶火口。Wasay–Guintubdan 纵走为经典路线。

tips.en: As of 2026 Kanlaon is under PHIVOLCS Alert Level 2 with repeated eruptions — the 4 km Permanent Danger Zone is off-limits and climbing is suspended. Keep it on your list, but only plan once alerts are lifted.
tips.zh: 截至 2026 年，坎拉翁处于 PHIVOLCS 二级警戒、年内多次喷发——4 公里永久危险区禁入，登山全面暂停。可先收藏进清单，待警报解除后再计划。

status.en: CLOSED — Alert Level 2, repeated eruptions in 2026; 4 km danger zone enforced.
status.zh: 封山中——2026 年多次喷发，二级警戒，4 公里危险区禁入。

photos.by: Original uploader was Squalluto at tl.wikipedia

duration.zh: 一日往返（纵走 4–5 小时）

summary.en: Cebu's highest point, rising over a landscape of jagged karst hills often compared to Bohol's Chocolate Hills. The classic plan links the short summit walk with a traverse down to Kawasan Falls' three turquoise cascades.
summary.zh: 宿务之巅。周围喀斯特尖峰林立，常被比作『尖版巧克力山』。经典玩法是登顶短线接纵走，一路下到 Kawasan 瀑布——三层碧蓝水潭收尾。

tips.en: Summit is an easy 30-min walk from the trailhead — perfect for sunrise or sunset. For the Kawasan traverse hire a local guide at Mantalongon; fetch water along the way. First half of the year is driest.
tips.zh: 从登山口到峰顶仅约 30 分钟，适合日出/日落。走 Kawasan 纵走请在 Mantalongon 请当地向导，途中记得补水。上半年最干爽。

name.zh: 塔利尼斯山（内格罗斯之角）

province.zh: 东内格罗斯省瓦伦西亚

jumpoff.zh: Bediao 村（Dauin），出口 Apolong（瓦伦西亚）

summary.en: The 'Horns of Negros' above Dumaguete: twin peaks, four crater lakes (Nailig, Yagumyum, Halawig, Malingin), a steaming solfatara field, mossy forest, and a finish at Casaroro Falls — the Visayas' tallest waterfall.
summary.zh: 杜马盖地上方的『内格罗斯之角』：双峰之下藏着四座火口湖（Nailig、Yagumyum、Halawig、Malingin）、一片蒸汽升腾的硫气田与苔藓森林，出山以米沙鄢最高的 Casaroro 瀑布收尾。

tips.en: Coordinate through the Cuernos de Negros Mountaineers (Dumaguete) — they know current trail and clearance conditions. Three days lets you camp at Lake Nailig and enjoy the lakes properly.
tips.zh: 建议通过杜马盖地的 Cuernos de Negros 山协安排行程——他们掌握最新路况与通行要求。三天行程可在 Nailig 湖畔扎营，充分领略湖区。

jumpoff.zh: Tampayan 村（锡布延岛马格迪旺）

summary.en: 'G2' — the Philippines' most technical classic hike, rated 9/9. Beyond Mayo's Peak the route becomes pure rock scramble: the jagged Knife Edge, 'Kiss the Wall', the Peak of Deception and Hillary Pass, on an island so biodiverse it's called the 'Galápagos of Asia'.
summary.zh: 『G2』——菲律宾徒步难度天花板（9/9）。过 Mayo 峰后全程裸岩攀爬：锯齿状刀锋岭、『贴壁吻』、『欺骗之峰』、『希拉里通道』连番上阵。锡布延岛生态之丰富，被称为『亚洲的加拉帕戈斯』。

tips.en: Strictly enforced 1:00 PM summit cutoff — start pre-dawn from Camp 1. Experienced hikers only; gloves and a helmet are worth carrying. Season matters: June onward the winds shift and the ridge becomes treacherous.
tips.zh: 严格执行下午 1 点登顶截止——需凌晨从 Camp 1 出发。仅限有经验的徒步者；建议戴手套，头盔也值得带。季节很关键：6 月后风向改变，岩脊将变得非常危险。

province.zh: 南达沃省 / 北哥打巴托省

summary.en: The roof of the Philippines. The Kidapawan trail crosses hot springs and the Marbel River, climbs the notorious '87-degree' forest walls, skirts Lake Venado — the country's highest lake — and tops out on a rocky summit beside the old crater.
summary.zh: 菲律宾之巅。基达帕万线穿温泉、渡 Marbel 河，攀上号称『87 度』的森林陡壁，经全国海拔最高的 Venado 湖，最终登上紧邻古火山口的岩石峰顶。

tips.en: Permits are managed per trail by the LGUs — arrange ahead (climber quotas apply). The Marbel River crossing becomes dangerous after heavy rain; heed your guides. Nights near Venado are cold and wet.
tips.zh: 各线路配额与许可由地方政府管理，需提前申请。暴雨后 Marbel 河渡口非常危险，务必听从向导。Venado 湖畔夜里又冷又湿，保暖防潮要做足。

summary.en: The Philippines' second-highest peak, deep in the Kitanglad Range. Pine slopes give way to a primeval mossy forest where every tree drips with moss — hikers call it 'mystical'. Sacred ancestral domain of the Talaandig tribe.
summary.zh: 菲律宾第二高峰，藏于基坦格拉德山脉深处。松坡之上是一片原始苔藓森林，树树垂苔，徒步者称之为『神秘之境』。这里是 Talaandig 部族的圣山与祖传领地。

tips.en: Tribal blessing is mandatory: the datu performs a ritual before every climb, groups are capped (~20), and climbers hang white cloth bands at the summit in respect. Arrange through Lantapan; the D2K traverse to Kitanglad (8/9) is for veterans only.
tips.zh: 必须获得部族祝福：出发前由 datu（酋长）主持献祭仪式，队伍上限约 20 人，登顶后按俗系白布带以示敬意。行程经兰塔潘安排；D2K 纵走至基坦格拉德（难度 8/9）仅限老手。

summary.en: The signature climb of Camiguin, the 'island born of fire'. A steep but short push to a mossy crater rim with pitcher plants, then island-on-island views: White Island below, Bohol, Siquijor and even Surigao on clear days. Hot springs at the trailhead for the descent.
summary.zh: 『火之岛』卡米金的招牌路线。短而陡的爬升直上苔藓火口，沿途猪笼草丛生；山顶望出去是层层叠叠的海岛——脚下的白岛、远处的保和、锡基霍尔，晴天甚至可见苏里高。下山即泡 Ardent 温泉。

tips.en: Register with DENR in Mambajao (~P200) and take the fixed-price local guide. The Ardent route is hot and rocky — start early; the Yumbing 'crater trail' is the shadier alternative. Rocks near the peak are blade-sharp: gloves help.
tips.zh: 先在曼巴豪 DENR 登记（约 200 比索）并请定价向导。Ardent 线热且多石，务必早出发；Yumbing 火口线树荫更多。峰顶岩石锋利如刃，建议戴手套。

summary.en: The highest point of Mountain Province, wrapped in montane rainforest with wild orchids, and linked by trail to the Batad rice terraces.
summary.zh: 高山省最高峰，山地雨林中野生兰花丛生，步道可一路连通 Batad 世界遗产梯田。

tips.en: Avoid Dec–Feb: frost and near-0°C nights have been recorded. The Barlig–Batad traverse is the classic route.
tips.zh: 避开 12–2 月：山顶曾记录霜冻、夜温近 0°C。经典走法为 Barlig–Batad 纵走。

summary.en: Luzon's second-highest summit, rising over the 'Four Lakes' of Kabayan through one of the country's best-preserved mossy forests.
summary.zh: 吕宋第二高峰。山脚下是卡巴延『四湖』，登顶穿越全菲保存最完好的苔藓原始森林之一，与普拉格山的草坡截然不同。

tips.en: Permits go through Mt. Pulag National Park; accredited guides mandatory. Often paired with Mt. Pulag in a 'Luzon 3-2-1' itinerary.
tips.zh: 许可经普拉格国家公园办理，必须请认证向导。常与普拉格山组成『吕宋 3-2-1』连登行程。

jumpoff.zh: Halsema 公路 55 公里处（阿托克）

summary.en: One of Luzon's highest peaks yet among its easiest — a village walk off the Halsema Highway to a three-cross summit with views of Pulag, Tabayoc and Ugo, plus the famous Timbak mummies nearby.
summary.zh: 吕宋最高峰之一，却也是最轻松的一座——从 Halsema 公路旁的村道缓步而上，三座十字架的山顶可望普拉格、塔巴约克与乌戈；附近还有著名的廷巴克木乃伊洞穴。

tips.en: No permits or guides required. Combine with Mt. Pulag trips along the Halsema Highway. Cold at any season — bring layers.
tips.zh: 无需许可与向导，常与普拉格行程顺路安排。全年偏冷，注意保暖。

jumpoff.zh: 洪杜安镇区 / Hapao 村

summary.en: A steep 1,580 m ascent into a mossy forest 'unrivalled in its primeval character', with bonsai-like summit trees and the UNESCO Hungduan rice terraces on the descent.
summary.zh: 1580 米的陡直爬升扎进一片『原始程度无出其右』的苔藓森林，峰顶矮树如盆景；下山路正对洪杜安世界遗产梯田。

tips.en: Summit temperatures drop to 5–8°C; blood leeches (matok) live in the wet forest. Camp at Ny-o (~1,630 m) before the push.
tips.zh: 峰顶仅 5–8°C，湿林中有旱蚂蟥。建议在 Ny-o 营地（约 1630 m）过夜后再冲顶。

summary.en: The 'Switzerland of Benguet': a circuit over Mt. Tagpaya and Mt. Oten among serrated ridges, pine slopes and terraced villages.
summary.zh: 『本格特的瑞士』——串联 Tagpaya 与 Oten 两峰的环线，锯齿状山脊、松林陡坡与梯田村落交错。

tips.en: Steep sustained ascents — train beforehand. Register at the municipal hall; local guides required.
tips.zh: 连续陡升，建议先积累体能。在镇政府登记并请当地向导。

summary.en: Baguio's backyard summit, paired with Mt. Cabuyao: an easy road-trail walk to radar domes, sunset sea-of-clouds views and, on clear days, the South China Sea.
summary.zh: 碧瑶的后山，常与 Cabuyao 山连走：沿缓坡土路上到雷达站，日落云海一绝，晴天可远眺南海。

tips.en: Very accessible from Baguio — good acclimatisation or family hike. Roads can be busy on weekends.
tips.zh: 从碧瑶出发极方便，适合热身或亲子行。周末路上人车较多。

summary.en: A grassy razorback ridge above the Agno River valley — steep, scenic and a favourite sunrise hike near Baguio.
summary.zh: Agno 河谷之上的草脊刀背线——坡陡景开，是碧瑶周边的人气日出路线。

tips.en: Exposed ridge — start pre-dawn and bring sun protection. Register at Dalupirip; guides available.
tips.zh: 山脊无遮蔽，宜凌晨出发并做好防晒。在 Dalupirip 登记，可请向导。

summary.en: Zambales' 'High Peak': an 18 km rocky mine road from near sea level to pine and mossy forest — one of the biggest altitude gains in the country, and a favourite training climb.
summary.zh: 三描礼士之巅：18 公里碎石矿道从近海平面一路爬到松林与苔藓林，是全菲爬升量最大的路线之一，经典拉练山。

tips.en: Sturdy footwear is essential — the rocky road is punishing. Very hot low down, very cold at the campsite; carry ample water.
tips.zh: 务必穿硬底徒步鞋——碎石路非常磨脚。下段酷热、营地夜寒，水要带足。

summary.en: The forested caldera peak of northern Bataan inside Bataan Natural Park, with Pasukuan Falls near the basecamp and a wilder traverse option to Morong.
summary.zh: 巴丹自然公园内的破火山口之峰，森林茂密；营地附近有 Pasukuan 瀑布，进阶者可纵走至 Morong，以吊桥收尾。

tips.en: Register at the DENR post (small fee); local guide system in place. The final 45-min push to the peak is steep.
tips.zh: 在 DENR 站登记（费用低），有成熟向导体系。登顶前约 45 分钟为陡坡。

summary.en: The 'Mountain of Thunder' of the Aeta people — steep open grass slopes above the Zambales coast, with a superb ridge traverse down to Anawangin Cove's white volcanic sand and pines.
summary.zh: 埃塔人的『雷霆之山』——三描礼士海岸上方的开阔草坡，经典走法是沿山脊纵走直下 Anawangin 海湾：白色火山沙滩配松林，山海一线。

tips.en: Almost no shade and no water high up — start pre-dawn, carry 3 L+. The traverse to the cove runs 8–9 km; boat out from Anawangin.
tips.zh: 上段几乎无遮蔽无水源——凌晨出发、带 3 升以上水。纵走段约 8–9 公里，抵 Anawangin 后乘船离开。

summary.en: Five rugged summits of the Zambales coastal range, usually hiked as a traverse to the quiet coves of Silanguin or Nagsasa.
summary.zh: 三描礼士海岸山脉的五座嶙峋山头，通常以纵走方式走向清静的 Silanguin 或 Nagsasa 海湾扎营。

tips.en: Same jump-off as Balingkilat; exposed and hot — dry-season dawn starts recommended. Arrange the exit boat in advance.
tips.zh: 与雷霆之山同一登山口；无遮蔽炎热，旱季宜凌晨出发。返程船只需提前安排。

summary.en: A history hike: the WWII 'Shrine of Valour' (Dambana ng Kagitingan) and its giant Memorial Cross crown this small Bataan peak overlooking Manila Bay.
summary.zh: 一条历史徒步线：山顶矗立着二战『英勇圣殿』与巨型十字纪念碑，俯瞰马尼拉湾，是巴塔安战役的纪念地。

tips.en: Easy and family-friendly; combine with the shrine museum. Hot at midday — morning visits are best.
tips.zh: 轻松亲子级，可顺游圣殿博物馆。正午炎热，建议上午前往。

summary.en: Banahaw's dark twin — the so-called 'Devil's Mountain' of folklore — with a W-shaped crater rim, pristine forest and far fewer crowds than its holy neighbour.
summary.zh: 巴纳豪山的『黑暗双子』——民间传说中的『魔鬼之山』。W 形火口缘、原始森林，比圣山邻居清静得多。

tips.en: Part of the Banahaw–San Cristobal protected landscape: access rules change — verify with the Dolores registration office before going. Guides from Kinabuhayan (~P200–300/day).
tips.zh: 属 Banahaw–San Cristobal 保护区，准入政策多变——出行前务必向多洛雷斯登记处核实。向导可在 Kinabuhayan 请（约 200–300 比索/天）。

status.en: Protected area — access has varied over the years; verify current rules before going.
status.zh: 保护区——历年开放政策多变，出行前请核实。

jumpoff.zh: 纳苏格布公路 83 公里处

summary.en: Batulao's grassy neighbour: a short open-slope climb to a bald summit with 360° views — often done as a twin dayhike with Batulao.
summary.zh: 巴图劳山的草坡邻居：短促的开阔爬升直上光头山顶，360° 视野。常与巴图劳一日连登。

tips.en: No shade at all — go early and bring sun cover. River wash-up available near the jump-off after the hike.
tips.zh: 全程无树荫——趁早出发并防晒。下山后登山口附近有溪流可冲洗。

province.zh: 八打雁省马比尼（阿尼劳）

summary.en: 'Pig's Spine' — rolling grass ridges above the dive haven of Anilao, with Balayan and Batangas Bays wrapping the horizon. Hike in the morning, snorkel in the afternoon.
summary.zh: 『猪脊』——阿尼劳潜水胜地上方的连绵草脊，Balayan 湾与八打雁湾环抱天际线。上午登山、下午浮潜是标配玩法。

tips.en: Very beginner-friendly; midday heat is the only real hazard. Cottages at Anilao make the swim finish easy.
tips.zh: 非常适合新手，唯一的敌人是正午高温。阿尼劳岸边有出租凉棚，方便下水收尾。

jumpoff.en: Sitio Sulok, Brgy. Sta. Cruz, Sto. Tomas
jumpoff.zh: Sulok（圣托马斯 Sta. Cruz 村）

summary.en: A gentle forest-and-coffee-grove hike in the Malipunyo range, topped by the white cross of its 'Grotto' summit — a beloved beginner and trail-run peak.
summary.zh: Malipunyo 山脉中的温和路线，穿过森林与咖啡林，白十字架立于『Grotto』峰顶——新手与越野跑者的心头好。

tips.en: Can be linked with Malipunyo for a longer day. Try local kapeng barako from farmers along the trail.
tips.zh: 可与马利普尼奥山连走加长行程。途中不妨尝尝村民的 barako 咖啡。

summary.en: The highest of the Malipunyo range, usually bagged in the 'MalMan' traverse with Manabu Peak through dense forest and talahib grass.
summary.zh: Malipunyo 山脉的最高点，经典玩法是与马纳布峰连成『MalMan』纵走，穿越密林与高茅草。

tips.en: Talahib grass can cut — wear long sleeves. Trails junction confusingly; take a local guide.
tips.zh: 茅草割人，务必长袖。岔路多易迷路，建议请当地向导。

summary.en: Low in altitude but long in kilometres: rice paddies, river crossings and cattle trails leading to 'Silyang Bato' — a rock throne with Pico de Loro across the valley.
summary.zh: 海拔不高但路程漫长：稻田、过溪与牧道尽头是『石王座』Silyang Bato，隔谷正对鹦鹉峰。

tips.en: Trails are muddy and braided after rain — dry season only is wise; a guide saves you from wrong turns.
tips.zh: 雨后泥泞且岔路极多——建议只在旱季走，并请向导带路。

summary.en: Jagged limestone above the Wawa gorge, where the giant Bernardo Carpio is said to hold the mountains apart — expect karst scrambles with gloves-on sections and river views.
summary.zh: Wawa 峡谷上方的锯齿石灰岩山。传说巨人 Bernardo Carpio 在此撑开双山。喀斯特岩段需戴手套攀爬，俯瞰 Marikina 河谷。

tips.en: Wear gloves for the sharp rock. Combine with Binacayan or Hapunang Banoi for the 'Wawa trilogy'.
tips.zh: 岩石锋利建议戴手套。可与 Binacayan、Hapunang Banoi 组成『Wawa 三部曲』。

summary.en: Wide dirt-road ridges on the Sierra Madre's edge — a mountain-bike-and-hiker playground with big skies, city-light views and easy camping.
summary.zh: 西马德雷山脉边缘的宽阔土路山脊——徒步与山地车共享的乐园，天空开阔，夜可露营看城市灯海。

tips.en: Zero shade — bring an umbrella hat or start at dawn. Popular with trail runners for training.
tips.zh: 全程无遮蔽——清晨出发或备遮阳。越野跑者的热门训练地。

summary.en: The best grandstand over Laguna de Bay: grassy summit slopes staring across the country's largest lake toward Talim Island and the Pililla wind farm.
summary.zh: 俯瞰内湖（全菲最大湖泊）的最佳看台：草坡山顶正对 Talim 岛与皮利利亚风电场。

tips.en: Lower trail is hot and open; upper forest gives relief. Weekday hikes are much quieter.
tips.zh: 下段暴晒、上段有林荫。工作日前往清静许多。

summary.en: Rolling Sierra Madre grass ridges (Mapatag Plateau) famous for low-hanging seas of clouds at dawn, with Kay-Ibon Falls as a side trip.
summary.zh: 西马德雷草坡山脊（Mapatag 高原），以清晨低垂的云海著称，顺路可访 Kay-Ibon 瀑布。

tips.en: For clouds, be on the plateau before sunrise — start hiking by 4:30 AM. Guides arranged at the barangay.
tips.zh: 想看云海需日出前抵达高原——凌晨 4:30 前起步。向导在村委会安排。

summary.en: The 'eight waterfalls' circuit: a sea-of-clouds ridge at sunrise, then a descent hopping between a chain of small falls and pools.
summary.zh: 『八瀑布』环线：日出时分的云海山脊，下山沿一连串小瀑布与水潭逐级而下，湿身收尾。

tips.en: Wear shoes with grip that can get wet. Popularity soared recently — book guides early on weekends.
tips.zh: 选抓地且不怕湿的鞋。近年大热，周末向导要早约。

jumpoff.en: DENR station, Brgy. Panicuason, Naga City

summary.en: Bicol's great forest volcano: waterfalls (Malabsay, Nabuntalan) low down, rich mossy forest above, and a verdant crater with views to Mayon on clear days.
summary.zh: 比科尔的森林火山：下段是 Malabsay 与 Nabuntalan 瀑布，上段苔藓林茂密，绿色火山口在晴天可遥望马荣火山。

tips.en: Register at the DENR station; leeches thrive in the wet forest. Panicuason is the standard trail, Patag-Patag the dayhike alternative.
tips.zh: 在 DENR 站登记；湿林中蚂蟥多。Panicuason 为标准线，Patag-Patag 线可一日往返。

jumpoff.en: Lake Bulusan, Brgy. San Roque, Bulusan

summary.en: A climb that begins by kayaking across Lake Bulusan, then rainforest to the Lake Aguingay camp and a pre-dawn scramble up cogon and scree to the crater summit.
summary.zh: 以皮划艇横渡布卢桑湖开场的攀登：雨林行进至 Aguingay 湖营地，凌晨沿茅草坡与碎石坡冲顶火山口。

tips.en: An active volcano and one of the rainiest corners of the country — under 30% of hikers get a clear summit. Check PHIVOLCS status before planning.
tips.zh: 活火山，且索索贡全年多雨——不足三成的登顶者能遇到晴空。计划前先查 PHIVOLCS 状态。

status.en: Active volcano — verify PHIVOLCS alert level before climbing.
status.zh: 活火山——出发前请核查 PHIVOLCS 警戒级别。

photos.by: Photo by Chris Newhall, (U.S. Geological Survey).

summary.en: A dormant volcano above Lake Buhi — home of the world's smallest commercial fish, the sinarapan — with grassland ridges and Bicol plains views.
summary.zh: 布希湖畔的休眠火山。湖中产世界最小的食用鱼 sinarapan；山脊草坡视野横贯比科尔平原。

tips.en: Combine with a Lake Buhi boat trip. Hot exposed sections — early start advised.
tips.zh: 可搭配布希湖游船。裸露段炎热，宜早出发。

photos.by: The original uploader was Ringer at Central Bikol Wikipedia.

summary.en: Panay's sacred rooftop and one of the Visayas' toughest climbs: open slopes, waterfalls and a mossy summit forest at the heart of Madja-as folklore.
summary.zh: 班乃岛之巅、米沙鄢最艰难的攀登之一：开阔陡坡、瀑布与苔藓峰林，也是 Madja-as 神话的中心。

tips.en: Three permits are technically required (provincial & municipal police, mayor) — arrange through Culasi and take accredited local guides.
tips.zh: 理论上需三份许可（省警、市警、市长）——经库拉西安排，并聘请认证当地向导。

summary.en: Panay's remote second summit — river crossings, knife ridges and untouched forest for hikers who want true wilderness.
summary.zh: 班乃岛偏远的第二高峰——渡河、刀脊与人迹罕至的原始森林，献给真正想进荒野的徒步者。

tips.en: Expedition-style logistics; often combined with Madjaas by strong teams. Coordinate with Antique mountaineering groups.
tips.zh: 需远征式后勤；强队常与马贾斯连登。请与安蒂克本地山协协调。

summary.en: The 'Sleeping Giant' of northern Negros: sulfur vents, crater amphitheatres and forest camps in the Northern Negros Natural Park.
summary.zh: 内格罗斯北部的『沉睡巨人』：硫气孔、火山口剧场与北内格罗斯自然公园的森林营地。

tips.en: Trails fade quickly here — local guides essential. Wet, leech-friendly forest: pack accordingly.
tips.zh: 路径易被植被吞没——必须请当地向导。森林湿润多蚂蟥，装备到位。

summary.en: Eastern Visayas' highest point, poking out of Leyte's cloud forests near Lake Danao — mist, moss and geothermal country.
summary.zh: 东米沙鄢最高点，从莱特的云雾森林中探出头来，邻近 Danao 湖——雾、苔与地热之乡。

tips.en: Frequently clouded and wet; coordinate guides via Ormoc tourism. Pair with a Lake Danao visit.
tips.zh: 常年云湿，经奥尔莫克旅游办安排向导。可顺游 Danao 湖。

summary.en: Three forested sister-summits on the small island of Biliran, ringed by waterfalls and one of the wettest mossy forests in the country.
summary.zh: 比利兰小岛上的三座姊妹峰，瀑布环绕，苔藓森林之湿润居全菲前列。

tips.en: Expect rain regardless of season; dry bags for everything. Combine with Biliran's falls and hot springs.
tips.zh: 任何季节都可能下雨，全装备防水。可搭配岛上瀑布与温泉。

summary.en: Cebu's history mountain: the 1957 crash site of President Magsaysay's plane, now a breezy camping summit with a memorial marker.
summary.zh: 宿务的历史之山：1957 年麦格塞塞总统坠机之地，如今是清风徐徐的露营山顶，立有纪念碑。

tips.en: Popular with Cebu campers on weekends; accessible by habal-habal. Combine with the Transcentral Highway sights.
tips.zh: 周末露营人气高，可乘 habal-habal 直达。可顺游中央山公路沿线。

time_to_summit.zh: 自 Intavas 约 4–6 小时

summary.en: The Philippines' fourth-highest peak, heartland of the Kitanglad range and home of the Philippine Eagle. Steel stairs aid the steep top section; summit bunkhouses serve the transmitter station.
summary.zh: 菲律宾第四高峰，基坦格拉德山脉的核心，菲律宾鹰的家园。顶段陡坡有钢梯辅助，峰顶因通信站而设有铺位屋。

tips.en: Coordinate with DENR and respect indigenous protocols (Talaandig/Higaonon rituals). Beware the high-voltage lines along the trail; bunk beds can be reserved via DENR.
tips.zh: 需与 DENR 协调并尊重原住民仪式（Talaandig/Higaonon）。沿线有高压线注意安全；峰顶铺位可经 DENR 预订。

summary.en: The country's sixth-highest mountain, usually traversed together with Mt. Wiji (Lumpanag) through moss forest and high cogon ridges, with Manobo ritual blessings at the trailhead.
summary.zh: 全国第六高峰，常与 Wiji 峰（Lumpanag）连成纵走：苔藓林与高山茅草脊相接，行前由马诺博部族主持祈福仪式。

tips.en: Cultural protocols apply — arrange via Pangantucan LGU. Cold, wet ridge camps: full rain kit.
tips.zh: 需遵循部族礼俗——经庞安图坎地方政府安排。山脊营地又冷又湿，雨具务必齐全。

summary.en: SOCCSKSARGEN's perfect cone above the pineapple fields of Tupi: dense montane forest with Philippine Eagles, and a 360° summit taking in Mt. Apo and General Santos.
summary.zh: 图皮菠萝田之上的完美锥形火山：山地密林栖息着菲律宾鹰，360° 峰顶可望阿波山与桑托斯将军城。

tips.en: Coordinate with Tupi tourism (fees ~P150 + P10 seedling — each climber plants a tree). Steep sustained final third.
tips.zh: 经图皮旅游办协调（约 150 比索+10 比索树苗费——每位登山者需种一棵树）。最后三分之一持续陡坡。

summary.en: The reward is Lake Holon: a caldera lake so clean locals say you can drink while swimming, cradled by virgin forest and sacred to the T'boli people.
summary.zh: 终点是霍隆湖：一座洁净到『边游泳边能喝』的火口湖，原始森林环抱，是特波利人的圣地。

tips.en: Register with T'boli tourism; camps at the lakeshore. Pack-in pack-out is strictly enforced — keep the lake pristine.
tips.zh: 在特波利旅游办登记；湖畔可扎营。严格执行垃圾全部带下山——请守护这汪清水。

jumpoff.en: Brgy. La Union, San Isidro, Davao Oriental
jumpoff.zh: La Union 村（圣伊西德罗）

summary.en: A UNESCO World Heritage mountain crowned by the country's largest pygmy 'bonsai' forest (600 ha), with pitcher plants, Twin Falls and the mysterious tidal lake 'Tinagong Dagat'.
summary.zh: 世界自然遗产之山：山顶是全菲最大的侏儒『盆景』森林（600 公顷），猪笼草遍布，还有双瀑布与传说随潮汐涨落的神秘湖泊『隐藏之海』。

tips.en: Access is tightly regulated for conservation — secure permits well in advance through the provincial government; climber numbers are limited.
tips.zh: 出于保护管控严格——需提前很久经省政府申请许可，且名额有限。

summary.en: Davao's watershed guardian and Apo's forested neighbour — deep primary forest all the way up, and the launch point of the legendary Talomo–Apo traverse.
summary.zh: 达沃的水源守护山、阿波山的森林近邻——原始森林一路到顶，也是传奇的 Talomo–Apo 大纵走起点。

tips.en: Permits via Davao City; the full Talomo–Apo traverse (4–5 days) is one of Mindanao's great expeditions for veterans.
tips.zh: 许可经达沃市办理；Talomo–Apo 全纵走（4–5 天）是棉兰老最经典的远征之一，仅限老手。

summary.en: Mindoro's legendary 9/9: relentless river crossings, leeches on '90% of the trail', knife ridges and mossy forest to a summit above the whole island. A rite of passage for Filipino mountaineers.
summary.zh: 民都洛的传奇 9/9：无尽的渡河、『90% 路段都有蚂蟥』、刀脊与苔藓林，峰顶俯瞰全岛。菲律宾登山者的成人礼。

tips.en: Only in Mar–May: wet-season flash floods make river crossings impassable. Access has opened and closed over the years — verify current status with Baco LGU and the Mangyan community.
tips.zh: 只宜 3–5 月：雨季山洪会让渡河段完全无法通行。历年多次开山封山——出行前向巴科政府与曼扬部族核实现状。

status.en: Access varies — confirm with Baco LGU before planning.
status.zh: 开放状态多变——计划前请向巴科地方政府确认。

summary.en: The northernmost mountain of the Philippines — the 'mountain of winds' over Batanes' hobbit-green hills, dense forest giving way to a steep reed-lined summit push.
summary.zh: 菲律宾最北之山——巴丹群岛绿丘之上的『风之山』。密林尽头是芦苇夹道的陡峭冲顶段，俯瞰国境之北的海。

tips.en: September's 'mini-summer' is said to be the only reliably cloud-free window. Guides ~P1,000 including hotel transfer; trails are muddy from constant moisture.
tips.zh: 据说只有 9 月的『迷你夏』能稳定见到无云的山顶。向导约 1000 比索含酒店接送；常年湿润，路面泥泞。

summary.en: A short, honest climb above Calauan: plantation paths give way to a steep grassy push, ending on a breezy meadow summit facing Banahaw, Cristobal and the Seven Lakes of San Pablo.
summary.zh: 卡劳安镇上方一座短小精悍的山：种植园小径接上一段陡直草坡，山顶是清风扑面的草甸，正对巴纳豪山、克里斯托瓦尔山与圣巴勃罗七湖。

tips.en: Steep and exposed in the middle section — go early and bring a trekking pole for the loose descent. Register at the barangay hall; often paired with nearby Mt. Atimla.
tips.zh: 中段陡且晒——趁早出发，下坡碎土建议带登山杖。在村委会登记；常与邻近的 Atimla 山连登。

province.zh: 保和省阿丽西亚（薄荷岛）

jumpoff.en: Registration area, Alicia (habal-habal from town center)
jumpoff.zh: Alicia 镇登记处（自镇中心乘 habal-habal）

summary.en: The 'TAPP' — Binabaje Hills of Alicia: a short but steep push up cogon-grass ridges to a rolling emerald summit that floats above a sea of clouds at sunrise. Underneath lies the Alicia Schist, Bohol's oldest rock (~150 million years).
summary.zh: 网红打卡地『TAPP』——阿丽西亚的 Binabaje 丘陵：短而陡的茅草坡直上翠绿的波浪状山顶，清晨常悬于云海之上。脚下正是保和岛最古老的岩层 Alicia Schist（约 1.5 亿年）。

tips.en: A local eco-guide is mandatory (~₱300/day) — register in Alicia town. Sunrise groups leave around 3 AM. The cogon grass scratches: wear long sleeves. Fully exposed and dry up top — carry your own water.
tips.zh: 强制请当地生态向导（约 300 比索/天），在 Alicia 镇登记。看日出的队伍约凌晨 3 点出发。茅草割人，穿长袖。山顶暴晒无水源，自带饮用水。
